Wisdom is knowing how to make the transformative leap of self-transcendence from the every day world to the real world.<ref name=":0" />

It is your capacity to overcome self-deception and to enhance your contact with reality. There is also a psychological component. It’s also the capacity to avoid self-destructive behavior<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |date=2021-03-07 |title=Being Mode - Awakening from the Meaning Crisis |url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210307140334/https://awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com/being-mode |access-date=2022-11-10 |website=[[awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com]]}}</ref>

Wisdom gives you resistance to the [[nine plagues]].

==See Also==

* [[Nine plagues]]
* [[Nobility]]
* [[Advancement]]
* [[Perknowledge]]

==References==

<references />

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Wisdom]][[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Wisdom]][[sn:Wisdom]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
